title: Nami Chooses Her Crew
description: Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 12, 13, this scene centers on Eneru, Enel, Nami, Luffy, Zoro. Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The drum transformed into a bird...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's some seasons in here, right...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You too, swordsman of the blue seas?

summary: Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.
